title: Titan methane lakes
script_summary: Explore the fascinating science behind Titan's methane lakes, unraveling their mysteries without sensationalism.

segments.voiceover: Did you know the largest lakes on Titan are made of methane?
Titan, Saturn's moon, has lakes and rivers, but not of water. Instead, it’s all about liquid methane.
These methane lakes can be over a mile deep! But why methane, not water?
On Titan, it’s freezing cold. Water is solid ice, so methane takes the stage as the liquid star.
Scientists are still unraveling its secrets, and Titan could hold keys to understanding life beyond Earth.
Curious about space? Hit that like button and follow for more fascinating science!
